'''ât-l-g-b''' ('''katalgeboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:moffle|moffle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-l-g-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moffle|moffle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-l-g-b
|-
! Lemma
| katalgeboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitalgeboko|thitalgeboko]] || [[word:jitalgeboko|jitalgeboko]] || [[word:shitalgeboko|shitalgeboko]] || [[word:kitalgeboko|kitalgeboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutalgeboko|thuthutalgeboko]] || [[word:jujutalgeboko|jujutalgeboko]] || [[word:shushutalgeboko|shushutalgeboko]] || [[word:kukutalgeboko|kukutalgeboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutalgeboko|thutalgeboko]] || [[word:jutalgeboko|jutalgeboko]] || [[word:shutalgeboko|shutalgeboko]] || [[word:kutalgeboko|kutalgeboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutalgeboko|thutalgeboko]] || [[word:jutalgeboko|jutalgeboko]] || [[word:shutalgeboko|shutalgeboko]] || [[word:kutalgeboko|kutalgeboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetalgeboko|thetalgeboko]] || [[word:jetalgeboko|jetalgeboko]] || [[word:shetalgeboko|shetalgeboko]] || [[word:ketalgeboko|ketalgeboko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotalgeboko|thotalgeboko]] || [[word:jotalgeboko|jotalgeboko]] || [[word:shotalgeboko|shotalgeboko]] || [[word:kotalgeboko|kotalgeboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotalgeboko|thotalgeboko]] || [[word:jotalgeboko|jotalgeboko]] || [[word:shotalgeboko|shotalgeboko]] || [[word:kotalgeboko|kotalgeboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtalgeboko|thĂŠtalgeboko]] || [[word:jĂŠtalgeboko|jĂŠtalgeboko]] || [[word:shĂŠtalgeboko|shĂŠtalgeboko]] || [[word:kĂŠtalgeboko|kĂŠtalgeboko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}
